tasks.label: 📋 View Deployment History
tasks.command: node -e "const h=require('./.dwomoh/deployment-history.json'); h.slice(0,10).forEach((d,i) => { const dur = Math.round(d.durationMs/1000); console.log('\n#' + (i+1), d.status.toUpperCase(), '|', d.timestamp.slice(0,19), '|', dur+'s', '|', d.commitHash.slice(0,8), '—', d.commitMessage.slice(0,55)); d.urls.forEach(u => console.log('   →', u)); }); console.log('')"

tasks.label: 🔍 Check Live Status
tasks.command: node -e "(async() => { for (const url of ['https://dwomohvibe.com', 'https://www.dwomohvibe.com']) { try { const r = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'DWOMOH-Status/1.0' } }); const b = await r.text(); const t = b.match(/<title[^>]*>([^<]+)<\/title>/i)?.[1] || '?'; console.log(r.status === 200 ? '✅' : '❌', url, '—', t.slice(0,60), '|', r.headers.get('x-powered-by') || 'no-next'); } catch(e) { console.log('❌', url, '—', e.message); } } })()"
